[nexwaytech (1).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26663958/nexwaytech.1.html)
# userfrm028.github.io<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>NexwayTech — Premium Car Mounts</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --dark: #111318;
    --card: #16191f;
    --border: #2a2d35;
    --green: #39d353;
    --green-dim: #1e7a2e;
    --white: #f0f2f5;
    --muted: #8a8f9e;
    --accent: #39d353;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 48px;
    height: 68px;
    background: rgba(10,10,10,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--white);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .nav-logo span { color: var(--green); }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex; gap: 36px; list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover { opacity: 0.85; }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    padding-top: 68px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -200px; right: -200px;
    width: 700px; height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(57,211,83,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 80px 64px 80px 80px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: rgba(57,211,83,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(57,211,83,0.3);
    color: var(--green);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 6px 16px;
    width: fit-content;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
  }

  .hero-badge::before {
    content: '';
    width: 6px; height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--green);
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    50% { opacity: 0.5; transform: scale(1.4); }
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 6vw, 6rem);
    line-height: 0.95;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
  }

  .hero-title .line-accent { color: var(--green); }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 300;
    line-height: 1.7;
    max-width: 420px;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: center;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.3s ease both;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 16px 40px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s, opacity 0.2s;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 12px) 0, 100% 12px, 100% 100%, 12px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 12px));
  }

  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); opacity: 0.9; }

  .btn-secondary {
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 15px 32px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }

  .hero-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 40px;
    margin-top: 64px;
    padding-top: 40px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.4s ease both;
  }

  .stat-value {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .stat-value span { color: var(--green); }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .hero-visual {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
    padding: 80px 60px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
  }

  .hero-visual::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(57,211,83,0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }

  .hero-img-wrap {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 480px;
  }

  .hero-img-wrap img {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }

  .hero-img-wrap:hover img { transform: scale(1.03) translateY(-8px); }

  .hero-label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -20px;
    right: 20px;
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 12px 20px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .hero-label strong { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-strip {
    background: var(--green);
    padding: 14px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .marquee-track {
    display: inline-flex;
    animation: marquee 20s linear infinite;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .marquee-item {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--black);
    padding: 0 32px;
  }

  .marquee-sep {
    color: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    padding: 0 8px;
  }

  @keyframes marquee {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
  }

  /* PRODUCTS */
  .products {
    padding: 120px 80px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .section-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-end;
    margin-bottom: 64px;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }

  .section-link {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding-bottom: 4px;
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .section-link:hover { color: var(--green); border-color: var(--green); }

  .product-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .product-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .product-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--green);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }

  .product-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--green);
    transform: scaleX(0);
    transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }

  .product-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

  .product-img-wrap {
    background: #f8f8f8;
    aspect-ratio: 1/1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  .product-img-wrap img {
    width: 85%;
    height: 85%;
    object-fit: contain;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }

  .product-card:hover .product-img-wrap img {
    transform: scale(1.06);
  }

  .product-tag {
    position: absolute;
    top: 16px; left: 16px;
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 4px 12px;
  }

  .product-body {
    padding: 28px 32px 32px;
  }

  .product-type {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--green);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .product-name {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .product-desc {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .product-features {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .feature-pill {
    background: rgba(57,211,83,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(57,211,83,0.2);
    color: var(--green);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 5px 12px;
  }

  .product-footer {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .product-price {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--white);
  }

  .product-price sup {
    font-size: 1rem;
    vertical-align: super;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .add-to-cart {
    background: var(--green);
    color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 8px) 0, 100% 8px, 100% 100%, 8px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 8px));
  }

  .add-to-cart:hover { opacity: 0.85; transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* FEATURES BAND */
  .features-band {
    padding: 80px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--dark);
  }

  .features-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 48px;
  }

  .feature-block {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .feature-icon {
    width: 56px; height: 56px;
    background: rgba(57,211,83,0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(57,211,83,0.25);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 20px;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
  }

  .feature-title {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .feature-desc {
    font-size: 0.825rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    padding: 60px 80px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 900;
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .footer-logo span { color: var(--green); }

  .footer-copy {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--muted);
  }

  .footer-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 28px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .footer-links a {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--green); }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 0 24px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .hero-content { padding: 60px 32px 40px; }
    .hero-visual { padding: 40px 32px 60px; }
    .products { padding: 80px 24px; }
    .product-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .features-band { padding: 60px 24px; }
    .features-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; text-align: center; padding: 40px 24px; }
    .section-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Nexway<span>Tech</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#products">Products</a></li>
    <li><a href="#features">Features</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Support</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">About</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-cta">Shop Now</button>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">New 2025 Collection</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">
      Drive<br>
      <span class="line-accent">Hands</span><br>
      Free.
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Premium car mounts engineered for precision, built for every journey. One-touch lock, 360° rotation — your phone, always in sight.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <button class="btn-primary">Shop Collection</button>
      <button class="btn-secondary">View Features</button>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div>
        <div class="stat-value">360<span>°</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Full Rotation</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-value">1<span>-Touch</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Lock & Release</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-value">4.9<span>★</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Customer Rating</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-visual">
    <div class="hero-img-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="NexwayTech Dashboard Car Mount">
      <div class="hero-label">Featured: <strong>Dashboard One Touch 8</strong></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-strip">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span class="marquee-item">Dashboard Mount <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Magnetic Mount <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">One-Touch Lock <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">360° Rotate <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Universal Fit <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Free Shipping <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Dashboard Mount <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Magnetic Mount <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">One-Touch Lock <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">360° Rotate <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Universal Fit <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Free Shipping <span class="marquee-sep">✦</span></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRODUCTS -->
<section class="products" id="products">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Our Products</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Car Mounts</h2>
    </div>
    <a href="#" class="section-link">View All Products →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="product-grid">
    <!-- Product 1 -->
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img-wrap">
        <span class="product-tag">Best Seller</span>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dashboard One Touch Car Holder">
      </div>
      <div class="product-body">
        <div class="product-type">Dashboard Mount</div>
        <h3 class="product-name">Dashboard One Touch Car Holder</h3>
        <p class="product-desc">Universal suction dashboard mount with one-touch lock and release. Fits smartphones up to 3.6in (9.2cm) wide with fully adjustable telescoping arm.</p>
        <div class="product-features">
          <span class="feature-pill">One-Touch Lock</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Adjustable Arm</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Suction Base</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Universal Fit</span>
        </div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="product-price"><sup>$</sup>49<sup>.99</sup></div>
          <button class="add-to-cart">Add to Cart</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Product 2 -->
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-img-wrap">
        <span class="product-tag">New</span>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Magnetic Car Mount">
      </div>
      <div class="product-body">
        <div class="product-type">Magnetic Mount</div>
        <h3 class="product-name">Magnetic Dashboard Car Mount</h3>
        <p class="product-desc">Powerful magnetic bracket for car dashboard with 360° rotation and metal ring included. Compatible with regular cases and all Android devices.</p>
        <div class="product-features">
          <span class="feature-pill">360° Rotate</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Metal Ring</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Strong Magnet</span>
          <span class="feature-pill">Dash Pad</span>
        </div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="product-price"><sup>$</sup>34<sup>.99</sup></div>
          <button class="add-to-cart">Add to Cart</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES BAND -->
<section class="features-band" id="features">
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feature-block">
      <div class="feature-icon">🔒</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Secure Grip</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Industrial-strength suction and magnetic hold keeps your phone locked in place on any road.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-block">
      <div class="feature-icon">🔄</div>
      <div class="feature-title">360° Rotation</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Full spherical rotation to switch between portrait and landscape in seconds.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-block">
      <div class="feature-icon">📱</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Universal Fit</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">Compatible with all smartphones from 4" to 7" screens, with or without a case.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="feature-block">
      <div class="feature-icon">🚗</div>
      <div class="feature-title">Easy Install</div>
      <p class="feature-desc">No tools needed. Attaches to any dashboard or windshield in under 30 seconds.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">Nexway<span>Tech</span></div>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2025 NexwayTech. All rights reserved.</p>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="#">Privacy</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Terms</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Contact</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Returns</a></li>
  </ul>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
